channel.title: 简报 Jae Daily · 2026年07月08日
channel.description: 国际政治 · 宏观财经 · 前沿科技 · AI 辅助分析

item.title: [未译] Trump looms large as Nato grapples with challenge of rearming Europe
item.description: The US president's inflammatory words have punctuated the image of unity at this crucial gathering, Security Correspondent Frank Gardner writes.

item.title: [未译] US Strikes Iran and Blocks Oil Sales in New Threats to Ceasefire
item.description: The US launched fresh airstrikes in Iran and revoked a waiver that allowed it to sell oil globally, further imperiling a peace agreement after a series of attacks on ships in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: [未译] A CJNG kingpin at a World Cup semifinal: The double life of El Mencho’s brother-in-law before his US arrest
item.description: Gerardo González Valencia attended an Argentina match at the 2014 World Cup in Brazil while the DEA was tracking his movements

item.title: [未译] X says top accounts steal videos from other users as it announces new video tools
item.description: Nikita Bier, X's head of product, said in a post on Monday that "[m]any videos from top accounts are simply stolen from other users, sometimes 5 years after they original

item.title: [未译] Woman suspected of Monaco bomb attack found dead in Ukraine
item.description: Police had been hunting Anastasiia Berezovska after a Ukrainian millionaire was injured in the blast.

item.title: [未译] One million more UK homeowners set to face higher mortgages
item.description: Homeowners face paying £45 a month more on average when they move onto a new deal over the next two years.

item.title: [未译] The Download: a smoking “endgame” and a new Elizabeth Bear story
item.description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. The UK’s generational tobacco ban might not work.

item.title: [未译] U.S. Trade Deficit Widens in May on Record Goods Imports
item.description: Imports of foreign goods, including pharmaceuticals and equipment for data centers, hit a record high, pushing the monthly trade deficit to its highest level in over a year.

item.title: [未译] Blasts rock Damascus during Macron visit
item.description: The blasts underscore the major security ⁠challenges in Syria, where French President Emmanuel Macron is the first head of state of ⁠a European Union country to visit since 2024.

item.title: [未译] Odin 1.0 Announcement
item.description: <p><a href="https://lobste.rs/s/5rvgim/odin_1_0_announcement">Comments</a></p>

item.title: [未译] Russia moves closer to full Olympic return ahead of 2028 Los Angeles Games
item.description: The International Olympic Committee provisionally lifted its suspension of the Russian Olympic Committee on Tuesday, paving the way for Russian athletes and teams to move closer to competing under the

item.title: [未译] Google announces Pixel 11 launch event in August
item.description: Google is hosting its next Made by Google launch event for Pixel hardware on August 12th in New York City, according to an invitation sent by Google to The Verge. Unusual

item.title: [未译] Anthropic is launching Claude Cowork on mobile and web
item.description: Starting Tuesday, Anthropic's Claude Cowork AI platform will be available on mobile and web for the first time. The expanded access is rolling out first to Max subscriber

item.title: [未译] Mass Mournings In Qom, Where Khamenei Ruled Supreme Over Iran’s Clerics
item.description: The ceremony for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, held at a site considered sacred by many Shiites, was the latest step in a weeklong funeral organized by Iran’s government.

item.title: [未译] S&P Dow Jones Signals Possible Frontier-Market Cut for Indonesia
item.description: S&P Dow Jones Indices has listed Indonesia as a country for potential market reclassification, saying it may consider implementing special treatment for its securities if circumstances worsen.

item.title: [未译] Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Inks $2 Billion Partnership With Morrison
item.description: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Bank will take a 15% stake in New Zealand-based infrastructure investor Morrison, as part of a new strategic partnership to provide its Japanese customers access to fresh investm

item.title: [未译] Ghana halts visit by South African president amid row over anti-migrant protests
item.description: Many in Ghana feared his presence would lead to mass protests, and officials say it is postponed for now.

item.title: [未译] Lawyer says detained Gaza doctor was severely beaten in Israeli jail
item.description: The lawyer for Dr Hussam Abu Safiya tells the BBC his client was so badly beaten he could not recognise him during a visit last week.

item.title: [未译] Online gamblers betting more than £1,000 to face new checks
item.description: Punters who bet more than £1,000 online in a 24-hour window will have to undergo an assessment, the regulator says.

item.title: [未译] Bethesda, id Software reportedly hit hard by Microsoft layoffs
item.description: As much as 50 percent of some teams affected by reductions, and more could be coming.

item.title: [未译] Samsung profits jump 1,800% as AI chip sales soar
item.description: The firm's shares fell sharply on Tuesday as some investors had expected an even stronger performance.

item.title: [未译] New footage shown at Kirk hearing shows man on rooftop near shooting scene
item.description: The preliminary hearing will determine whether Tyler Robinson, accused of killing conservative activist Charlie Kirk, will stand trial.

item.title: [未译] Hungary's public news broadcasts halted in bid to scrap Orban-era propaganda
item.description: The country's main state TV channel displayed a message saying it was "sorry" for lying on Tuesday.

item.title: [未译] Robots available for rent: But what can they do?
item.description: Robotics tech is changing fast, so for many it makes sense to rent a robot.

item.title: [未译] Amazon bars breastfeeding boss from business course
item.description: Rachael Bews says she told on the way her child would not be allowed on site. Amazon has apologised for not communicating its policy clearly.

item.title: [未译] 'I wear it on my middle finger': The rise of the defiant divorce ring
item.description: Around the world women are marking their split with new - or repurposed engagement - rings.

item.title: [未译] Banks accused of pushing customers away from basic accounts
item.description: Some of the UK's biggest banks have been failing their most vulnerable customers, according to the financial regulator.

item.title: [未译] Phone contract comparisons 'amounted to mis-selling' student loans, MPs say
item.description: A new report says students were not well-enough informed that their loan terms could change retrospectively.

item.title: [未译] The foundational elements of AI architecture that IT leaders need to scale
item.description: With the rapid progress of AI capabilities and the move to agentic systems, organizations are expanding their use cases as the technology continues to grow. That constant evolution also introduces ris

item.title: [未译] Why worms (and microbes) are catching on as a manure pollution solution
item.description: Anthony Agueda, a third-generation California dairy farmer, pulls a rake through a bed of dark, wet wood chips on his family’s land in Hickman, a tiny town in the state’s agricultural heartland. He re
